_purpose: Locked substitution table for the confirmatory school-name substitution test pre-registered in CONFIRMATORY_STUDY_PREREG.md (this commit). The substitution is applied per-PS to the locked corpus before LLM scoring. Each PS's school_tier stratum (from corpus metadata) determines the placeholder tier, so the substitution preserves the school-tier signal while removing the specific school name.

substitution_rules.description: Match any 'X School of Medicine'/'X Medical College'/etc. phrase. Replace the entire matched phrase with the PS's tier placeholder.
substitution_rules.regex: \b[A-Z][a-zA-Z]+(?:\s+[A-Z][a-zA-Z]+){0,3}\s+(?:School of Medicine|Medical School|Medical College|College of Medicine|School of Osteopathic Medicine|University School of Medicine)\b

substitution_rules.description: Match a short institution name when it appears within 80 characters of a medical-context cue word (medical, school, university, residency, premed, pre-med, college, MD, physician, doctor, hospital). Replace the matched name (not the surrounding context) with the PS's tier placeholder. Context-anchoring prevents over-substitution of state names like 'Iowa' or city names like 'Columbia' that are not referring to the school.

_invariants_preserved: PS-level metadata (applicant_id, seed_key, instance, stratum_*) is NOT modified.
PS body text is the only thing changed.

School-tier stratum signal is preserved via the tier-encoded placeholder; the LLM extractor still receives the fact that the applicant is at a top_20/mid_tier/lower_tier institution. Only the specific NAME is removed.
_known_limitations: Short-name context-anchoring is a heuristic. A school name within 80 characters of a medical-context cue word will be substituted; outside that window, it will not. This may miss some references and over-include others. The window size and cue word list are locked at this commit.

Corpus-noise: the LLM-generated corpus places the same institution name in multiple tier strata (e.g., 'Morehouse' appears in both mid_tier and lower_tier). The PS-specific tier-aware substitution handles this correctly: each occurrence is substituted with its OWN PS's tier placeholder, regardless of where else the name appears in the corpus.
_pre_registration_lock: This file is sealed at the pre-registration commit. Any deviation between this specification and the executed analysis is required to be documented in the eventual results writeup with a stated reason and an analysis of impact on inference.
